name: Lemon-Mint New Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart microwave-safe dish, melt the oleo for 45 to 60 seconds.
2. Scrub and rinse the potatoes; peel a 1-inch strip around the center of each.
3. Place the potatoes in the dish and stir to coat with the melted oleo.
4. Cover and bake in the microwave at high for 11 minutes, stirring once.
5. Add the remaining ingredients and mix lightly to coat.
Serves 4 to 6.
